metadata.name: Report a Broken Item in a Room

description: A housekeeper discovers a broken lamp while cleaning a room.

nodes.task_description: The housekeeper reports the broken lamp to their supervisor.
The supervisor creates a maintenance work order for a 'Broken Lamp'.

expected_outcome.expected: A work order is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: An engineer is dispatched to replace the lamp.

expected_outcome.expected: A technician is assigned to fix the issue.
